The entityName is mandatory --> <!-- A Event can only be a Constant event( value="") or an DependendParameter event (DefRef) or an DependendParameter event (DefRef) with and ConditionParameter --> <Event entityName="Crypto_MainFunction" value="0.01"/> </TimingEvents> </Synchronization>
